note: Basel SMA operational-risk capital per the 2026 US Basel Endgame reproposal (BCBS d424 bucket structure; ILM neutralization per the reproposal's US variant). golden_hash filled by golden-parity.test.mjs --update.

vectors.name: bucket1_small_bank_ilm_neutralized
vectors.description: $500m Business Indicator (all bucket 1, <= $1bn @ 12%). US ILM neutralization on (default) -- ILM=1, ORC=BIC=$60m, RWA=$750m.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: BCBS d424 (Dec 2017 Basel III finalization) Standardized Measurement Approach for operational risk, as carried into the US Basel Endgame reproposal (three NPRs proposed 2026-03-19, comment period closed 2026-06-18): Business Indicator Component via marginal bucket coefficients (12%/15%/18% at $1bn/$30bn), Internal Loss Multiplier neutralized to 1 for US banking organizations per the reproposal (contested provision, subject to change at finalization), RWA = Operational Risk Capital x 12.5.
output_payload.note: Bucket coefficients applied MARGINALLY, not as a flat rate on the whole Business Indicator. ILM neutralization is a US-specific reproposal choice, not a BCBS-standard default -- set use_us_ilm_neutralization:false to model the non-neutralized ILM (BCBS d424 formula) with annual_op_losses supplied.

vectors.name: bucket2_midsize_bank_ilm_neutralized
vectors.description: $10bn Business Indicator crosses into bucket 2 ($1bn-$30bn @ 15%) -- marginal BIC = 0.12*$1bn + 0.15*$9bn = $1.47bn. ILM neutralized -> RWA=$18.375bn.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: BCBS d424 (Dec 2017 Basel III finalization) Standardized Measurement Approach for operational risk, as carried into the US Basel Endgame reproposal (three NPRs proposed 2026-03-19, comment period closed 2026-06-18): Business Indicator Component via marginal bucket coefficients (12%/15%/18% at $1bn/$30bn), Internal Loss Multiplier neutralized to 1 for US banking organizations per the reproposal (contested provision, subject to change at finalization), RWA = Operational Risk Capital x 12.5.
output_payload.note: Bucket coefficients applied MARGINALLY, not as a flat rate on the whole Business Indicator. ILM neutralization is a US-specific reproposal choice, not a BCBS-standard default -- set use_us_ilm_neutralization:false to model the non-neutralized ILM (BCBS d424 formula) with annual_op_losses supplied.

vectors.name: bucket3_gsib_ilm_not_neutralized_penalizes
vectors.description: $50bn Business Indicator (all 3 buckets, GSIB-scale). ILM neutralization OFF (modeling non-US / possible reversal) with a decade of loss history averaging $700m/yr -- loss component $10.5bn exceeds BIC $8.07bn, so ILM=ln(e-1+ratio)=1.11 > 1, penalizing capital: ORC=$8.92bn, RWA=$111.47bn.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: BCBS d424 (Dec 2017 Basel III finalization) Standardized Measurement Approach for operational risk, as carried into the US Basel Endgame reproposal (three NPRs proposed 2026-03-19, comment period closed 2026-06-18): Business Indicator Component via marginal bucket coefficients (12%/15%/18% at $1bn/$30bn), Internal Loss Multiplier neutralized to 1 for US banking organizations per the reproposal (contested provision, subject to change at finalization), RWA = Operational Risk Capital x 12.5.
output_payload.note: Bucket coefficients applied MARGINALLY, not as a flat rate on the whole Business Indicator. ILM neutralization is a US-specific reproposal choice, not a BCBS-standard default -- set use_us_ilm_neutralization:false to model the non-neutralized ILM (BCBS d424 formula) with annual_op_losses supplied.

vectors.name: insufficient_loss_history_defaults_ilm_to_one
vectors.description: $2.5bn Business Indicator (bucket 2), ILM neutralization OFF but only 2 years of loss history supplied (< the 5-year minimum) -- ILM defaults to 1 for insufficient data, BCBS d424 para 40.

output_payload.regulatory_basis: BCBS d424 (Dec 2017 Basel III finalization) Standardized Measurement Approach for operational risk, as carried into the US Basel Endgame reproposal (three NPRs proposed 2026-03-19, comment period closed 2026-06-18): Business Indicator Component via marginal bucket coefficients (12%/15%/18% at $1bn/$30bn), Internal Loss Multiplier neutralized to 1 for US banking organizations per the reproposal (contested provision, subject to change at finalization), RWA = Operational Risk Capital x 12.5.
output_payload.note: Bucket coefficients applied MARGINALLY, not as a flat rate on the whole Business Indicator. ILM neutralization is a US-specific reproposal choice, not a BCBS-standard default -- set use_us_ilm_neutralization:false to model the non-neutralized ILM (BCBS d424 formula) with annual_op_losses supplied.
